mapper.select: SELECT a.ImageNo, a.imageTitle, a.UserId, b.ImageData FROM ( SELECT ImageNo, ImageData FROM ImageData WHERE ImageNo > 0 AND rowid in(select max(rowid) from ImageData group by ImageNo) )b INNER JOIN ImageBoard a ON a.ImageNo = b.ImageNo ORDER BY ImageNo DESC
SELECT ImageData, OldName, ImageStep FROM ImageData WHERE ImageNo=#{ImageNo} ORDER BY ImageStep ASC
SELECT a.ImageNo, a.ImageTitle, a.ImageContent, a.UserId, b.ImageData FROM ImageBoard a INNER JOIN ImageData b ON a.ImageNo = b.ImageNo WHERE a.ImageNo=#{ImageNo} ORDER BY b.ImageStep ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE ImageBoard SET ImageTitle=#{ImageTitle}, ImageContent=#{ImageContent} WHERE ImageNo=#{ImageNo}
mapper.select: select MAX(ImageStep) from ImageData where imageNo=#{imageNo}
SELECT ImageData FROM ImageData WHERE ImageNo=#{ImageNo}
